subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1915-04-24
subcodes.first_line: The inner, spiritual life of man is like unto this well. He must allay the thirst of the travellers on the path of Truth with the water of significances... I hope thou wilt become the boiling, gushing, flowing well of the Love of Bahá'u'lláh, irrigating the parched ground of the hearts
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @living waters; water of life, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
